description: Complete documentation restructure: Rewrite README.md (Chinese) and README_EN.md (English) to be more professional, attractive and readable. Create docs/CHANGELOG.md. Update all docs to say 18 agents and v6.0. Update SKILL.md.
steps: 1. README.md (Chinese) - Complete rewrite: Better hero section with a compelling hook ('你的AI投资决策委员会'). '3秒看懂' visual summary section. Cleaner quick start (literally 3 commands). Feature highlights as punchy bullet points not dense tables. Show input AND output examples. Professional but accessible tone. 18 investors. v6.0.0. Keep the 18-investor table but make it cleaner. Add a 'Why Augur?' section. Keep Star History chart. Add architecture diagram reference. Simplify the version log into a brief section pointing to CHANGELOG.md.
2. README_EN.md (English) - Same quality rewrite as Chinese version. Mirror structure. 18 investors, v6.0. Professional English copy.

3. Create docs/CHANGELOG.md - Extract version history from README into a dedicated changelog file. Format: ## v6.0.0 (current), ## v5.6, ## v5.5, etc. Both Chinese and English sections or just Chinese is fine (follow README pattern).
4. Update docs/agent-integration-guide.md - Fix all '17' to '18'. Fix any references to 'scanner/' path (should be 'src/augur/'). Update version references to v6.0.
5. Update docs/agent-integration-guide-en.md - Same fixes as Chinese version.
6. Update docs/hermes-setup-guide.md and docs/hermes-setup-guide-en.md - Update version to v6.0, ensure 18 agents mentioned, clean up examples.
7. Update SKILL.md - Change all '17' to '18', update version, ensure paths reference src/augur/ correctly.
8. Update SVG files (docs/images/hero-banner-en.svg) - Change '17' references to '18' in text elements. (Note: architecture SVGs were handled in FEAT-001 but verify hero-banner-en.svg content text).
acceptance_criteria: README.md is compelling, professional, and says 18 agents / v6.0
README_EN.md mirrors the Chinese version quality
All docs reference 18 agents and v6.0
No references to old 'scanner/' path remain in docs
